metadata.tagline: India's premier B2B marketplace bridging the gap between event organizers seeking sponsorship and brands looking for impactful partnerships.
metadata.platform_type: The B2B marketplace where organizers meet sponsors and partners to build something remarkable.

enterprise.description: Free listing by appointing SponsorshipSearch as exclusive sponsorship partner; pay only when results delivered

events.title: A Soulful Kirtan Concert at ISKCON NOIDA Auditorium
events.description: An interactive evening of soulful kirtan, uplifting bhajans, and mantra meditation, brought to life through the energy of live musicians and collective participation. More than a concert, this is an immersive and transformative experience designed to help you reconnect with peace, purpose, and inner joy.
events.venue_address: ISKCON Temple, Govinda Dham and Bhaktivedanta Academy A-5, Maharaja Agrasen Marg, Opposite NTPC Office, Block A, Sector 33 Noida

audience.summary: Target audience is Corporate Professionals, IT Professionals, Business Owners, Entrepreneurs, Spiritual Seekers, Families.

events.title: Game of titans
events.description: GAME OF TITANS is India's biggest obstacle race and fitness championship, bringing together athletes, fitness enthusiasts, corporate teams, and fitness communities from across the country. The event celebrates strength, endurance, determination, and the spirit of competition through a large-scale sporting and entertainment experience.

events.title: Bhakthi Jathara
events.description: Its a bhajan clubbing, with renowned singers and artists. Chinmayi sripada, Tanikella Bharani, and so many artists will perform. And also dance performances. Vibing with techno and electronic bhakthi songs. Event will be on 26th July from 5pm onwards.
events.venue_address: Gachibowli indoor stadium, old mumbai highway, Hyderabad, Telangana

events.title: TRINETRA
events.description: Inspired by the spirit of Bengal's grandest celebration, Durga Puja, MAKAUT launches its Autumn Fest TRINETRA 2026. Designed as a two-day immersive experience, TRINETRA brings together high-energy performances, competitions, cultural showcases, live entertainment, interactive experiences, and youth-driven creativity.
events.venue: Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology
events.venue_address: NH-12 (Old NH-34), P.O. - Simhat, Police Station – Haringhata, District - Nadia, PIN - 741249, West Bengal

audience.summary: TRINETRA 2026 targets youth-centric audience driven by culture, entertainment, creativity, and digital engagement.

organizer.name: MAKAUT (Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology)

events.title: Eventifye Dance League 2026 - EDL 2026
events.description: Eventifye Dance League 2026 (EDL 2026) is a premium multi-city dance championship and YouTube reality series organized by Eventifye Entertainment, designed to discover and showcase emerging dance talent.
events.venue_address: Moti Jheel Avenue, Swaroop Nagar, Kanpur-208002, Uttar Pradesh

events.title: Ignite 2.0
events.description: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic college fest scene named IGNITE 2.0 at Meridian Nursing and Paramedical College, Varanasi.
events.venue_address: Meridian Nursing and paramedical college, Varanasi (Ground Campus)

events.title: Cardio carnival
events.description: Cardio Carnival is a fitness and entertainment festival designed for the new generation. It brings together fitness, music, wellness, sports, creators, brands, and communities under one platform.

events.title: LAST NIGHT FRAPPE INDIA TOUR
events.description: Late Night Frappe Tour 2026 - a multi-city India tour celebrating the release of Frappe Ash's new album. Spanning 10 major cities, targeting culturally active urban audiences and college demographics.

events.title: TELHUNT STAGE INDIA OPEN MIC TOUR
events.description: TELHUNT STAGE INDIA TOUR 2026 - India's Youth Open Mic & Creator Discovery Tour across 10 cities. Features stand-up comedians, poets, musicians, storytellers, and campus creators.

events.title: SARGAM: National Level Intercollege Cultural Fest
events.description: National Level Inter-College Cultural Fest at New Horizon College of Engineering with 20,000+ participants and attendees from across the country.
events.venue_address: near Marathahalli, Kaverappa Layout, Kadubeesanahalli, Bellandur, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560103

events.title: Quest Fame Style Icon Jr 2026
events.description: A leading platform for kids' talent hunt for young stars, culminating in a grand finale featuring esteemed jury including Malaika Arora, Sandip Soparrkar, Tannaz Irani, Dr. Rita Gangwani, and Sangram Singh.

events.title: San Silvestre del Cabo
events.description: A New Year's Eve 5K run held at Marina Puerto Los Cabos. Inspired by the global San Silvestre tradition, blending sport, celebration, and community.
events.venue_address: Blvd. Mar de Cortes s/n, 23403 San José del Cabo, B.C.S.

events.title: Podcast With Sneha karwat
events.description: The Sneha Karwat Show - a dynamic podcast platform diving deep into the minds of visionary founders, influential leaders, renowned actors, and celebrated comedians. Focus on Mindset, Leadership, and Business Transformation.
events.venue_address: Flat no 1, Bldg 35, Mit Niketan Road, Kanakia Sanskruti Phase 2, 90 ft Rd, Thakur complex, Kandivali E.

events.title: music festival
events.description: A 2-day lifestyle music & entertainment festival in Hyderabad featuring live music, comedy, stunts, food, gaming, and flea markets, attracting urban youth and young professionals (18-35).

events.title: Jai Madaan speaker event
events.description: An event with renowned motivational speaker Dr Jai Madaan to be held in Mumbai on Sunday 9 Aug 2026 by Rotary club of Mumbai Divas with over 600 people.

audience.summary: Established and elite businessmen and women living in and around upscale location of Juhu in Mumbai

notes.data_limitations: Some event pages are client-side rendered (e.g., KAMYAB ZINDAGI showed 'Loading event...'), so full details for those events were extracted from listing cards only. Blog page showed no actual posts - likely loaded client-side.
